notes: v1.0.79 removes stray PATCH_NOTES/CHANGELOG/release-note artifacts from packaging policy. Patch records must stay only in README.md and AI_HANDOFF_CARDVILLE.md. Delta Patch remains changed-file overlay without public/assets.
label: Docs-only patch record hygiene and clean Delta Patch packaging
description: Use the Full ZIP for clean install. Use the Delta Patch ZIP by overlaying it on CardVille v1.0.78 full; changed patch records are stored only in README.md and AI_HANDOFF_CARDVILLE.md.
